---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem to help us improve LUCA Passport
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or logs.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant logs to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- Component: [frontend / backend / both]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Browser (if frontend): [e.g. Chrome 126]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 22.x]
- Deployment: [local / Docker Compose / hosted]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here (role used, demo account, etc.).
